original_image_tags: A typed FBI memorandum on official letterhead. Two hole-punch marks are visible at the top center. The seal of the Department of Justice / Federal Bureau of Investigation is in the top left corner. A red "ENCLOSURE" stamp is in the lower right. A handwritten file number is in blue ink. A "COPIES DESTROYED" stamp is in the bottom left corner.

elements.description: Top left corner: United States Department of Justice / Federal Bureau of Investigation seal.
Bottom right: Large handwritten red number '62-83894-418' above a red stamp 'ENCLOSURE'.
Bottom left: A redacted or faded stamp block containing 'COPIES DESTROYED' and partially legible text including '270' and 'NOV 19 1964'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the same visual elements (seal, stamp, handwritten number) and identical quoted text ('ENCLOSURE', 'COPIES DESTROYED'), with only minor detail differences that do not contradict.
